creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
pkg-static: gegl3-0.3.20_1 conflicts with coreutils-8.25 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/gcut
*** Error code 70

It is not my problem, but I opened cause of a post in FreeBSD forum:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/63184/

It should possible  to install the bin/* from gegl3 in sbin.
